title: Wire auth refresh on a connection
description: Track token expiry per connection and require re-auth before expiry so private streams never outlive authorization.
body: Steps: 1. Record the token's expiry when the connection authenticates. 2. Schedule a server-side check before expiry; require the client to send a refreshed token. 3. On successful refresh, extend the connection; re-check channel authorization. 4. On expiry without refresh or on revocation, stop sending authorized data and close. 5. Have the client refresh proactively and reconnect if closed. Rollback point: shorten max connection lifetime to force reconnect-with-fresh-auth. Validation: tests show an expired-token connection stops authorized data and a revoked token severs the stream.
